title: CreepyCraft
description: The Scariest Minecraft Modpack For a Vanilla Styled Experience!
body:
![Logo Of CreepyCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3282e60785d0d7f2d4a123022847714464ca8052.png)

[Our Website](https://1sidplayer.github.io/CreepyCraftWEB/)

**WARNING: THE MODRINTH VERSION OF CREEPYCRAFT WILL HAVE LESS MOD PRE-INSTALLED IN THE PACK, EITHER INSTALL THE MODPACK FROM PLANET MINECRAFT ( LINK IN THE PAGE BOTTOM ) OR INSTALL THEM MANUALLY ( READ BEFORE THE MOD LIST SPOILER )**



Hi! Thanks For Viewing This Modpack! So This Modpack Will Enhance The Game Making It Much Scarier.


This Modpack Is Multiplayer Friendly!


Feel Free To Add Mods And Use This In Your Videos I Only Ask To Add The Link To This Modpack In The Description!

If You Want To Play Multiplayer You Can Use [This Mod](https://essential.gg/) Or You Can Add This Modpack To Your Private Or Public Server But Just As Like In The Videos You Must Credit Me

If You Want To Learn How To Use The Mod Watch [This Video!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZULHFyK3Znk)

When You Invite A Friend In Your World With This Modpack Using Essential Remember To Enable "Share RP" Or Some Mods Wont Work

I Even Added A Datapack For Wither Storm Mod But That's Optional, The Datapack Adds a Way To Craft The Command Block To Create The Wither Storm Easily Making The Game a Little Bit Easier.



**WARNING: THE LISTED MODS WITH THE ❌ EMOJI ARE NOT PER-INSTALLED IN THE PACK, INSTALL THEM MANUALLY OR DOWNLOAD THE PACK FROM PLANET MINECRAFT ( LINK IN THE PAGE'S BOTTOM )**



This Modpack Contains These Mods : ( The Libraries For The Mods Were Not Written )

DISCLAIMER:
I Do NOT Own Nor Helped In Any Mod Listed ( Apart [Cant Sleep Mod](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/cant-sleep-mod/) ) All The Mod's Credits Are Given To Their Authors.

I Didnt Add Many Famous Scary Mods Because I Wanted To Do a Vanilla Styled Modpack.


FAQ:
  
Will You Make a Discord Server?
I Have One! [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/NFndaxdKUe)

How Can i Contact You?
To Contact Me You Need To Join The Discord Or Use The [Website](https://1sidplayer.github.io/CreepyCraftWEB/)

Does This Modpack Work In Multiplayer?
             Yes, I Have Tested It Multiple Times And Works With The Essential Mod, Instead, To Make It Work In a Server You Need To Remove Void Fog And True Darkness Mod

Can i Use This In My Lives / Videos?
Yes, But You Need To Add The Link In The Description.

Well, What Are You Waiting For? Go And Try!


INSTALLATION:

RESOURCE PACK:

Download The Resource Pack And OPEN ME File In The Latest Version

Put The Resource Pack In Your Resource Pack Folder

( Optional ) DATAPACK:

Follow [This Tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AAD3PV2aGvk&t)
